content.en:
Zhan Tianzong.

As a fivefold heavenly force, the Zhantian Sect is not much weaker than the Liuli Sect, and now the entire sect also has a supreme true ancestor and dozens of top true ancestors, and the number of other true ancestors has also reached as many as 300,000.

Although compared to the peak period, Zhan Tianzong was far inferior, but it also recovered a lot of strength.

As the supreme true ancestor of the chief true ancestor of the Zhan Tian Sect, the cold-eyed true ancestor, he was a little anxious at the moment.

Just now, he sent a group of True Ancestors to rescue the Heaven Splitting Sect, but he couldn't get in touch.

Clearly, there are forces that are covering up the message.

After all, separated by two spaces, it is not difficult to block the transmission of information, so it can be seen that something is wrong.

"I want to take a look, which force dares to provoke our Zhantian Sect?"

The cold-eyed True Ancestor said angrily.

Immediately, he cast a pupil-type Dao technique, his eyes released a cold and cold light, and through the layers of space, he looked at the battlefield space where the Heaven Splitting Sect was located.

Rumble!!!!!

The void cracked, and a tragic picture emerged.

It was a corpse, all the corpses of the Heaven Splitting Sect and the True Ancestor of the Battle Heaven Sect, and he also saw many familiar faces.

This moment.

The cold-eyed True Ancestor was completely furious, he thought that the True Ancestors sent out were just in trouble, but he didn't expect that they had already been killed.

That's tens of thousands of true ancestors!

Rumble!!!

A finger suddenly poked out of the void, shattering his pupil technique with a single blow.

Soon, the space where the Zhantian Sect was located began to ripple.

A large number of True Ancestors descended one by one, and dense True Ancestors appeared one after another, completely surrounding Zhan Tianzong.

After a while, nearly 2 million true ancestors gathered in front of the gate of Zhan Tianzong Mountain.

Looking at so many True Ancestors, many True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs of the Zhan Tian Sect were terrified, as if they wanted to break away from the Zhan Tian Sect.

However, it was already too late!

The cold-eyed True Ancestor stared at so many True Ancestors, and his heart was also very panicked.

He had now recognized the identities of these True Ancestors, and they were the True Ancestors of the major forces in the Daoshan Realm, and the other party had actually joined forces.

If it was a single force, Zhan Tianzong was not afraid at all, and he didn't even take it seriously.

Even before that, he didn't take the forces of the Dao Mountain Realm in his eyes, he only had the other Middle Triple Heaven forces and the Upper Triple Heaven forces in his eyes, and he didn't care about the forces of the Dao Mountain Realm at all.

Unexpectedly, these forces actually joined forces to enter the Zhan Tian Sect.

"Everyone, your Dao Mountain Realm must be too bold, dare to attack our Zhantian Sect, aren't you afraid of angering those Upper Triple Heaven forces?"

The cold-eyed True Ancestor asked.

The Blood Jade True Ancestor of the Forbidden Hall said coldly: "Our major forces have hatred with the Heaven Splitting Sect, we only wanted to destroy the Heaven Splitting Sect, but we didn't expect your Zhan Tian Sect to get involved and kill many of our True Ancestors, and our major forces will never die with your Zhan Tian Sect." Today, if you Zhantian Sect either hand over all the resources and inheritance, or you will wait to destroy the sect!"

The same words, the same routines, suck, but they are very applicable.

Anyway, it's just an excuse, it doesn't matter if it sucks or not!

The cold-eyed True Ancestor laughed, he understood it completely.

The major forces in the Daoshan Realm were eyeing their Zhantian Sect, or their inheritance and treasures, so they united.

"Our Zhantian Sect is also a very ancient sect, and at its peak, it even reached the Six Heavens Force, and now there are a large number of Dao Ancestors who are sleeping. It's up to you, if you want to destroy our Zhan Tian Sect, I'm afraid you will also have to pay a heavy price, is it worth it?" the cold-eyed True Ancestor dissuaded.

"It's worth it!"

Blood Jade True Ancestor Dao.

Wow!!!!!

The momentum of two million True Ancestors shrouded in, and the Great Array of the Protector Sect of the Battle Heaven Sect squeaked.

Looking at this scene, the cold-eyed True Ancestor closed his eyes, he knew that this battle could not be avoided.

But the Battle Heaven Sect will definitely not admit defeat easily, even if the mountain gate is broken, it will have to pay a heavy price to these Dao Mountain Realm forces.

"Escape as soon as possible below the True Ancestor, and all above the True Ancestor will fight!"

The cold-eyed True Ancestor ordered.

In an instant, the battle began!

......

Ye Tian stayed in the Void Heaven True Country, although he did not participate in the siege of the Battle of Tianzong, but he was also paying attention to this battle.

He sent a team of soldiers of the Nine Poles Legion to observe the situation of this battle, reporting from time to time, so as to grasp first-hand information.

Soon, groups of information came in.

"We're already fighting!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As time passed, the details of the battle were passed on.

At the beginning, the Battle Heavenly Sect suffered heavy losses, a large number of True Ancestors fell and died, and those True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs couldn't escape at all, and the aftermath of the battle wiped them out.

But soon, a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Battle Heaven Sect forcibly woke up, although he could only exert the combat power of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but it also inflicted heavy losses on the alliance of the major forces, and a top True Ancestor was killed in seconds on the spot.

However, in the end, the major forces used their hole cards to trap the Dao Ancestor, forcibly delaying the time, so that the Dao Ancestor was constantly suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and finally the power was reduced to the level of a Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he was besieged to death by a Supreme True Ancestor and many top True Ancestors.

Being able to sacrifice a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor is already the biggest bottom line of the Battle Heaven Sect, they don't dare to sacrifice the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor anymore, and the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor are useless to wake up, and the First Heavenly Dao Ancestor does not dare to wake up, and after awakening, they can't stop the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm at all, and they will die as soon as they come out.

In the end, the Zhan Tianzong Mountain Gate was forced.

But something unexpected happened!

A treasure of the Battle Heaven Sect was urged by a top True Ancestor of the Battle Heaven Sect, and it exploded into an infinite thunder pillar in a self-destructive manner and killed tens of thousands of True Ancestors in seconds.

Unfortunately, Daoshan's Xeon True Ancestor was directly killed by the explosion.

At the same time, 100,000 True Ancestors were injured to varying degrees, and half of the Zhantian Sect was destroyed, and countless treasures and inheritances were destroyed.

Many True Ancestors didn't know what that treasure was, but Ye Tian had a guess.

"If there is no guess, it should be the Zixiao Thunder Bead, a one-time treasure that seals the Zixiao Chaos Divine Thunder. "

Ye Tian guessed.

This kind of Zixiao Thunder Bead is rumored to be a one-time weapon created by the Thunder Sect Supreme True Ancestor after finding the Zixiao Chaos Divine Thunder, and using the power of the Supreme Dao Ancestor to ban it from entering the special Thunder Bead.

It is rumored that the Zixia Sect has the Zixiao Thunder Bead, but it is also one of the precious hole cards passed down from the ancient times, because the Zixia Sect was an eightfold heaven force in the ancient era, and it had a supreme thunder ancestor.

It's a pity that that the Supreme True Ancestor later fell, causing the Zixia Sect to fall and become a Sevenfold Heaven Force.

But the Zixiao Thunder Bead is a hole card in the Seven Heavens forces like the Zixiao Sect, why does the Zhantian Sect have it?

What Ye Tian didn't know was that the Zixia Sect had sold a lot of Zixiao Thunder Beads when it was the Eight Heavens Force, and the Zhantian Sect bought one as one of the sect's hole cards.

For a long time, Zhan Tianzong had never used this treasure.

This time, the Mountain Gate of Zhan Tianzong was forced, where could it manage so much, so it directly detonated the Zixiao Thunder Bead.

The Battle Heaven Sect was destroyed, and the major forces in the Daoshan Realm suffered heavy losses, and the most unfortunate one belonged to Daoshan, and a supreme true ancestor who had been cultivated with great difficulty fell.

The loss of the Void Heaven One Vein this time was not small, and many True Ancestors had fallen, but judging from the harvest, it was enough to make up for the loss.

Of course.

Those high-ranking Dao Ancestors didn't necessarily care about these losses, they just wanted to get useful inheritances and treasures so that they could improve their strength.

Ye Tian was very glad that he did not participate in this battle, otherwise if he was hit by the Zixia Thunder Bead, his forbidden body that had not yet become Xiao Cheng might not be able to resist.

When the time comes, if he does not die, I am afraid that he will also suffer extremely serious injuries, and it will take a long time to recover.

Ye Tian originally thought that this matter would pass for the time being, but he underestimated the impact of this matter, and even the major transcendent forces underestimated the impact of this matter.

In fact, the forces of the domain realm are connected to each other, and the forces that are friendly with the Zhan Tian Sect are not absent, and with the information of the Dao Mountain realm, a lot of news is difficult to find out.

For example, this time, one of the Sixfold Heaven Forces and three Fivefold Heaven Forces had a very good relationship with the Zhan Tian Sect, and the sleeping Dao Ancestors of the Zhan Tian Sect awakened a wisp of consciousness, and contacted these four forces through special secret methods, allowing them to take revenge on the major forces in the Dao Mountain Realm.

So, on the tenth day of the forced mountain gate of Zhan Tianzong.

A top-notch power in the True Kingdom of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was destroyed, and countless living beings fell.

This top power is the Xuanyin Sect!
